title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudoconsociatum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudoconsociatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a sub-species of the Hieracium lachenalii plant, belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudoconsociatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support digestive health.
